Menu

APPETIZERS

  • Salad Rolls: shrimp – $9.00, chicken – $8.50, beef – $9.50, salmon – $11.00
    (Rice papers wrapped with, lettuce, mint, cilantro, bean sprouts, clear noodles, & our house sauce)
  • Pork Spring Rolls – $8.50
    (Deep fried, served with lettuce, cilantro, mint & our house sauce)
  • Japanese Gyoza – $9.00
    (Pan fried dumplings with pork & cabbage)
  • Chicken Saute Kabob – $9.00
    (Roasted almonds & peanut sauce)
  • Chicken Yakitori Kabob – $9.00
    (Skewered with bell pepper, zucchini, asparagus with yakitori sauces)
  • Garlic Chicken Wings – $9.00
    (Deep fried with garlic sauce)
  • Vietnamese Grilled Pork Sausage – $9.00
    (Fresh garlic, black pepper & fish sauce)
  • Hot & Sour Soup – $10.50
    (Choice of chicken or pork)
  • Hot & Sour Seafood Soup – $11.00
    (Choice of shrimp or swai fish)

 

VEGETARIAN APPETIZERS

  • Tofu Salad Roll – $8.50
    (Rice papers wrapped with, lettuce, mints, cilantro, bean sprouts, clear noodles, & our house sauce)
  • Tofu Yakitori Kabob – $9.00
    (Skewered bell pepper, zucchini, asparagus with yakitori sauce)
  • Vegetable Tempura – $8.50
    (Variety of lightly battered vegetables)
  • Steamed Tofu – $4.50
    (Served with light soy sauces)
  • Fried Tofu – $4.50
    (Served with light soy sauce)
  • Miso Cup –  $3.50
    (Organic miso tofu, snow peas, bean sprouts & scallion)

    (Mock lamb, asparagus, zucchini, snow peas, carrot, broccoli, ginger, garlic & wine)

    (Tofu, mock chicken, lemongrass, garlic, turmeric, onion, carrot, snow peas, broccoli & cashews)

  • Tofu & Asian Kale Braised in Black Bean Sauce – $13.50
    (Tofu, kale, carrots, zucchini & snow peas w/ black bean sauce)

  • Mango Mock Chicken – $14.50

  • Eggplant Curry – $12.00
